slogan.intro_slogan: Welcome to Rincón Criminológico! A space for the dissemination of criminology that aims to teach you in an easy way what this science consists of and its importance in society.

info_access.explain_articles: Learn about diverse aims of criminological interest in an easy way.
info_access.explain_news: Find out about relevant current events through criminological analysis.
info_access.explain_reflections: A space to go deeper into issues related with Criminology.

content.title_content: If you have interest in Criminology, you have arrived in the right place
content.explain_free_content: Rincón Criminológico is a space that its objective is to approach Criminology to everybody, as it offers <bold>FREE content</bold>.
content.explain_premium_content: If you want to access to <bold>PREMIUM content</bold>, in each post you could download a PDF with all the complete information for only:

find.title_find: What will you find in Rincón Criminológico?
find.first_card: Access to FREE and PREMIUM content
find.third_card: A space created from scratch by Lucía Ruiz Martínez, criminologist and web developer
find.fourth_card: The place that teaches you and invites you to reflect and think critically at the same time

questions.title_questions: Have you any questions? You could resolve them here
